reference_document.title: Analysis and Assessment of Gateway Process
reference_document.author: LTC Wayne M. McDonnell, US Army Intelligence
reference_document.summary: Comprehensive Army assessment of the Monroe Institute's Gateway Experience program, exploring how brain hemisphere synchronization techniques (Hemi-Sync) can alter consciousness. Covers hypnosis, transcendental meditation, biofeedback, holographic universe theory, quantum mechanics of consciousness, out-of-body experiences, and the role of resonant breathing in achieving altered states.

related_documents.title: STAR GATE Project: An Overview
related_documents.summary: Broad overview of the three main activity areas of the STAR GATE program: foreign assessment, external research, and in-house investigations of paranormal phenomena for intelligence purposes.

related_documents.title: The Gateway Program (Monroe Institute)
related_documents.summary: Overview of the Monroe Institute's Gateway Program, describing Robert Monroe's development of binaural beat technology, the Hemi-Sync process, and the structured training system for consciousness exploration.

related_documents.title: Monroe Institute of Applied Sciences
related_documents.summary: Describes the Monroe Institute's training program (originally named M-5000) with over 1,500 participants trained in consciousness exploration techniques.

related_documents.title: Gateway Intermediate Workbook
related_documents.summary: Practical training workbook with detailed instructions for resonant breathing exercises, energy visualization, creating protective energy fields (REBAL), out-of-body techniques, remote viewing, and pattern change exercises. Contains step-by-step breathing protocols.

related_documents.title: Meditation Investigation
related_documents.summary: Overview of breakthroughs in research concerning altered states of consciousness, the brain, and scientific interest in meditation practices.

related_documents.title: An Evaluation of the Remote Viewing Program
related_documents.summary: Evaluation of the Defense Intelligence Agency's STAR GATE program involving the use of paranormal phenomena, primarily remote viewing, for intelligence collection purposes.

related_documents.title: A Comprehensive Research Plan for Anomalous Mental Phenomena
related_documents.summary: 59-page SAIC research plan proposing a $30M, 5-year systematic investigation of anomalous mental phenomena including ESP, telepathy, clairvoyance, precognition, and psychokinesis. Originally classified SECRET/NOFORN.

related_documents.title: Anomalous Mental Phenomena: Selected Papers
related_documents.summary: Massive 439-page compilation of selected scientific papers on anomalous mental phenomena by SAIC's Cognitive Sciences Laboratory. Includes meta-analyses, mainstream publications, and physics research.

related_documents.title: A Suggested Remote Viewing Training Procedure
related_documents.summary: 80-page detailed report by an expert viewer assembling subjective experiences associated with remote viewing, providing a structured training procedure.

related_documents.title: Dolan's Training Technique
related_documents.summary: Describes a structured training technique involving three-phase breathing (inhale through nose, hold, exhale through mouth), progressive relaxation meditation, countdown to altered states, and consciousness expansion for remote viewing.

related_documents.title: Psychic Process, Energy Transfer, and Things That Go Bump in the Night
related_documents.summary: Explores the two dominant subdivisions of psychic phenomena: extrasensory perception (ESP) and psychokinesis (PK), examining the mechanisms of energy transfer in psychic processes.

related_documents.title: Controlled Offensive Behavior - USSR
related_documents.summary: Department of Defense Intelligence Document prepared by the Medical Intelligence Office examining Soviet research into controlled offensive behavior and psychoenergetic capabilities.

related_documents.title: Soviet and East European Parapsychology Research
related_documents.summary: Survey of Soviet and East European parapsychology research covering psychokinesis (mentally moving objects, affecting electrical circuits), telepathy, and related phenomena.

related_documents.title: Remote Viewing: Parapsychological Potential for Intelligence Collection
related_documents.summary: Military analysis of remote viewing's parapsychological potential for intelligence collection, referencing SRI International research by scientists Harold Puthoff and Russell Targ.

related_documents.title: Ritual, Synchronicity, and Inner Guidance
related_documents.summary: Describes breathing and energy work techniques involving drawing energy threads into the body through breath, ritual practices, and achieving synchronicity with inner guidance.

related_documents.title: Hemi-Sync Brain Wave Patterns
related_documents.summary: Research on synchronous/simultaneous brain wave patterns in both hemispheres (HEMI-SYNC), their rare occurrence in typical human consciousness, and their role in altered states.

related_documents.title: Mars Exploration (Remote Viewing Session), May 22, 1984
related_documents.summary: Transcript of a remote viewing session targeting Mars, in which a viewer was directed to explore geological activity and structures on Mars using consciousness projection techniques.

related_documents.title: Gateway Breathing Techniques and Patterning
related_documents.summary: Details how breathing techniques and patterning serve as keys in consciousness training, providing familiar mind sets that can be easily recalled through daily practice.

related_documents.title: Monroe Institute Method and Techniques
related_documents.summary: Describes the patented Monroe method and techniques, including the generic patent granted to Robert Monroe for his binaural beat consciousness-altering system.

related_documents.title: Project STAR GATE Research and Peer Review Plan
related_documents.summary: DIA's multi-year research and development program plan for STAR GATE, developed in response to Congressional Directed Action to investigate anomalous mental phenomena with rigorous scientific oversight.

related_documents.title: Soviet Parapsychology: Biocommunication and Bioenergetics
related_documents.summary: 25-year survey of Soviet and Czechoslovakian parapsychology research, covering paranormal phenomena including ESP, telepathy (Soviet 'biocommunication'), and psychokinesis (Soviet 'bioenergetics').

related_documents.title: SAIC Experiment Database (Anomalous Mental Phenomena)
related_documents.summary: Database of SAIC experiments in anomalous mental phenomena, conducted under the supervision of a Scientific Oversight Committee, following SRI International's Cognitive Sciences Program.
